$comment_1: Project-level MCP servers. Claude Code reads this file on session start. Per-machine secrets live in .env.local (gitignored). To activate Banani MCP: (1) put BANANI_API_KEY in .env.local, (2) update the `command`/`args` below to match the actual Banani MCP launcher Banani gives you (their docs / CLI), (3) restart your Claude Code session.
$comment_2: WARNING — the package name `@banani/mcp-server` below is a PLACEHOLDER. Banani's real MCP package/binary may differ. Check Banani's docs and replace `command`/`args` with the canonical launcher before relying on this. The fork-author owns this swap (1-line edit).
